claim_tested: err_Pade(z) = z^2/(2+3z+z^2) predicts observed error before measuring gamma_obs
result: NEGATIVE — mean ratio err_obs/err_pred = 88.6x for standard models
invalid_regime: z > 0.03: model-specific spread 5-1300x larger than prediction
paper_claim_revised: Hierarchy valid mathematically. z predicts REGIME not exact error. For non-anomalous large-theta models (z<0.01): any formula works. For z~0.3 (theta=10K): use 1/(1+z). Anomalous models (GQA/SWA/Hagedorn): must measure.
